name: My City application
message: Did you receive Handala’s message (https://www.israelhayom.co.il/tech/tech-news/article/15843626) on Saturday? We follow your internal events more than you, and we always had and will have our influence… We just don’t see the need to publish a report of all our actions. Handala’s hand in many events of the occupied territories is still hidden! Our meaning was clear…
